items_flat.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 推出 Grok 4.5，專注編碼與代理任務優化
items_flat.summary_en: xAI introduced Grok 4.5 on its official site as its smartest model to date, built on a massive new V9 foundation model plus Cursor coding data. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, delivering Opus-class performance with faster speeds, better token efficiency and lower cost. The model is publicly available via grok.com, X apps and API for paid users, with rollout continuing on July 16.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 在官網推出 Grok 4.5，稱為迄今最強模型，基於全新 V9 基礎模型加上 Cursor 編碼數據訓練，鎖定真實世界軟體工程、代理工作流與知識工作，提供 Opus 級效能但速度更快、token 效率更高且成本更低。模型已透過 grok.com、X 應用程式與 API 向付費用戶開放，7 月 16 日持續推送。
items_flat.analysis_en: The explicit focus on Cursor co-training and practical efficiency metrics positions xAI as a strong contender in the coding-agent niche where speed, cost and real-world engineering results matter as much as raw benchmarks. Continued phased rollout on the 16th suggests emphasis on stable deployment over headline-grabbing single-day launch.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 明確強調與 Cursor 共同訓練及實用效率指標，讓 xAI 在講求速度、成本與真實工程結果的編碼代理領域成為有力競爭者。16 日持續分階段推送，顯示其重視穩定部署而非單日炒作。
items_flat.quote: Grok 4.5 is our newest flagship model built for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work. It's our strongest yet, trained on a massive new V9 foundation model plus Cursor data.
items_flat.quote_zh: Grok 4.5 是我們最新旗艦模型，專為編碼、代理任務與知識工作打造。它是我們最強的模型，基於全新大型 V9 基礎模型加上 Cursor 數據訓練而成。

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs outline joint bioresilience approach
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 公布生物韌性聯合策略
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs published their joint approach to bioresilience on July 16, detailing how frontier AI models will support prevention, detection and response to biological threats. The plan covers over 15 partnerships with governments and biosecurity organizations, tools such as AlphaFold, IsoDDE drug design engine, AlphaGenome, SynthID for DNA screening, and AlphaEvolve for sequencing optimization, while committing to prevent misuse and enable trusted access for countermeasures.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 於 7 月 16 日發布生物韌性聯合策略，說明前沿 AI 模型如何支援生物威脅的預防、偵測與應對。計畫包含與政府及生物安全組織的逾 15 項合作，使用 AlphaFold、IsoDDE 藥物設計引擎、AlphaGenome、SynthID DNA 篩選及 AlphaEvolve 序列優化等工具，同時承諾防止濫用並為可信夥伴提供對抗措施的存取權限。
items_flat.analysis_en: The post formalizes a dual-use posture that treats AI both as a potential risk amplifier and as essential infrastructure for biosecurity. Concrete tooling (SynthID for DNA, AlphaEvolve) and the call for new partnerships move the discussion from principles to operational commitments, though success will depend on how access controls and threat modeling perform under real pressure.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此文將 AI 同時視為潛在風險放大器與生物安全關鍵基礎設施的雙重立場正式化。具體工具（DNA 用 SynthID、AlphaEvolve）及呼籲新夥伴關係，將討論從原則推向實務承諾，但成效仍取決於存取控制與威脅建模在真實壓力下的表現。
items_flat.quote: We are committed to working openly and collaboratively — with biosecurity labs, governments and the broader scientific community — to ensure AI is developed and deployed responsibly to help protect against one of society’s greatest risks.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們承諾與生物安全實驗室、政府及更廣泛的科學社群公開合作，確保 AI 以負責任的方式開發與部署，幫助防範社會最大風險之一。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI advances automated red-teaming for GPT-5.6 Sol development
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 推進 GPT-5.6 Sol 開發的自動紅隊測試
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI detailed its use of extensive automated red-teaming, including over 700,000 A100e GPU hours dedicated to discovering universal jailbreaks, as part of preparing GPT-5.6 Sol. This self-play and continuous adversarial testing approach was employed to strengthen safeguards against prompt injections and other vulnerabilities before and during deployment. The company stated it will continue running automated red teaming throughout the model's lifecycle.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 詳細說明在準備 GPT-5.6 Sol 時，使用超過 70 萬 A100e GPU 小時進行廣泛自動紅隊測試，以發現通用越獄攻擊。此自我對弈與持續對抗測試方法，用於強化防範提示注入及其他漏洞的防護措施，並在部署前後執行。公司表示將在模型整個生命週期持續運行自動紅隊測試。
items_flat.analysis_en: Automated red-teaming at this scale creates a genuine safety flywheel and improves robustness, but heavy reliance on internal automated systems limits external verification. The decision to keep core attacker models and full evaluation details largely internal raises ongoing questions about transparency versus security in frontier model releases.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此規模的自動紅隊測試建立真正的安全飛輪並提升穩健性，但高度依賴內部自動化系統限制外部驗證。將核心攻擊模型與完整評估細節主要保留在內部的決定，持續引發前沿模型發布中透明度與安全性之間的疑問。
items_flat.quote: We’ve also dedicated over 700,000 A100e GPU hours to automatically find universal jailbreaks, and we will run automated red teaming continuously during deployment.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們也投入超過 70 萬 A100e GPU 小時自動尋找通用越獄，並將在部署期間持續執行自動紅隊測試。

links.label: OpenAI Deployment Safety Hub - GPT-5.6 System Card

items_flat.title_en: Meta begins alerting parents when teens discuss self-harm with Meta AI
items_flat.title_zh: Meta 開始在青少年與 Meta AI 討論自傷時向家長發出警示
items_flat.summary_en: Meta announced that parents using Instagram supervision tools will now receive alerts if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI. Flagged conversations undergo manual review; the feature is live in the US, UK, Australia and Canada. The company frames the move as balancing teen privacy with duty of care for at-risk youth.
items_flat.summary_zh: Meta 宣布，使用 Instagram 監督工具的家長，當青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷時將收到警示。被標記的對話會經過人工審核；此功能已在美國、英國、澳洲及加拿大上線。公司將此舉定位為在青少年隱私與高風險青少年的照護責任之間取得平衡。
items_flat.analysis_en: The move sets a concrete industry precedent for AI companion safety by involving human review and parental notification. Success will depend on false-positive rates, review quality, and whether teens alter behavior knowing conversations may be monitored, potentially affecting trust in the AI itself.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此舉透過人工審核與家長通知，為 AI 陪伴工具安全樹立具體產業先例。成效將取決於誤報率、審核品質，以及青少年是否因知曉對話可能被監控而改變行為，進而影響對 AI 的信任。
items_flat.quote: Parents using Instagram supervision tools will now be notified if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI.
items_flat.quote_zh: 使用 Instagram 監護工具的家長，若青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷，現將收到通知。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI raises ChatGPT custom instructions limit to 5,000 characters
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令限制提升至 5,000 字元
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI increased the character limit for custom instructions in ChatGPT from 1,500 to 5,000 for Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business and Education users. This allows more detailed and persistent user personas and context. Free and Go tiers remain at the previous 1,500 character limit.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令的字元限制從 1,500 提升至 5,000，適用於 Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 及 Education 用戶，讓用戶能設定更詳細且持久的個人設定與情境。免費與 Go 方案維持原本 1,500 字元限制。
items_flat.analysis_en: A quiet but practical quality-of-life upgrade that reduces friction for power users who previously had to re-state context every session. It also quietly widens the capability gap between free and paid tiers without requiring a new model release.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這是一項低調但實用的生活品質提升，減少付費用戶每次會話都需重述情境的摩擦。同時在不需新模型發布的情況下，悄然拉大免費與付費用戶之間的能力差距。
items_flat.quote: Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business, and Education users can now save up to 5,000 characters.
items_flat.quote_zh: Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 與 Education 用戶現可儲存最多 5,000 字元。

links.label: OpenAI Help Center / ChatGPT Release Notes

xai.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
xai.title_zh: xAI 推出 Grok 4.5，專注編碼與代理任務優化
xai.summary_en: xAI introduced Grok 4.5 on its official site as its smartest model to date, built on a massive new V9 foundation model plus Cursor coding data. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, delivering Opus-class performance with faster speeds, better token efficiency and lower cost. xai.summary_zh: xAI 在官網推出 Grok 4.5，稱為迄今最強模型，基於全新 V9 基礎模型加上 Cursor 編碼數據訓練，鎖定真實世界軟體工程、代理工作流與知識工作，提供 Opus 級效能但速度更快、token 效率更高且成本更低。模型已透過 grok.com、X 應用程式與 API 向付費用戶開放，7 月 16 日持續推送。

xai.quote: Grok 4.5 is our newest flagship model built for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work. It's our strongest yet, trained on a massive new V9 foundation model plus Cursor data.
xai.quote_zh: Grok 4.5 是我們最新旗艦模型，專為編碼、代理任務與知識工作打造。它是我們最強的模型，基於全新大型 V9 基礎模型加上 Cursor 數據訓練而成。

brief_en: xAI officially introduces Grok 4.5 as its strongest model for coding and agentic workflows; Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs publish joint bioresilience framework using AI for biosecurity; OpenAI details automated red-teaming in GPT-5.6 development and raises custom instructions limit; Meta begins parent alerts for teen self-harm discussions with AI.
brief_zh: xAI 於官網正式推出 Grok 4.5，定位編碼與代理工作最強模型；Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 發布生物韌性聯合框架；OpenAI 說明 GPT-5.6 自動紅隊測試並提升自訂指令限制；Meta 開始向家長警示青少年與 AI 討論自傷議題。
